display.purpose: Page thesis and major collection headings.

label.purpose: Provenance, state, category, and measured notes.

shadows.name: interaction-lift
shadows.purpose: Directly hovered or focused publication cards only.

motion.name: section-shift
motion.purpose: Navigation, card lift, and annotation reveal.

narrative.overview: A living collection whose architectural light makes the relationship between source and useful knowledge visible.

rules.name: The Sunbeam Rule
rules.body: Yellow marks an active relationship or moment of discovery; it is never scattered decoration.

rules.name: The Section Rule
rules.body: Prefer a structural rule or tonal cut to a decorative shadow.

dos: Use annotation only when it adds traceability.
Retain the efficient lateral navigation model.
donts: Do not literalize the concept with floor plans.
Do not use generic rounded dashboard cards.
Do not use orange as the product accent.
